title: verbena hastata var. paniculata
intro: Verbena hastata var. paniculata, also known as Swamp Verbena or Frostweed, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its clusters of small, fragrant flowers and its ability to thrive in wet environments. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, cuts, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Verbena hastata var. paniculata include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its essential oil can be extracted for topical use, making it a versatile herb for natural remedies.
